name: Beef Tamale Pie
recipeIngredient: 7 oz can whole kernel corn, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Spray a 12x8x2-inch baking dish with nonstick cooking spray.
3. Cook the beef in a skillet over medium heat until browned and no pink remains. Break up clumps with a wooden spoon.
4. Set aside 1 cup of cheese for topping. Mix together the remaining cheese, corn muffin mix, eggs, salsa, chili powder, corn, and 2 cups water in a bowl until smooth.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared baking dish.
6. Bake at 450°F for 20 minutes.
7. Sprinkle the reserved cheese on top.
8. Continue baking for an additional 5 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean. Allow to stand for 10 minutes before serving.
